transcript.text:
[Today's Mukbang Series]
[Fish Roe & Intestines Noodles]
[Freshwater Marsh Clam Soup]
[A 26-year-old Tzu-jussi] (Tzuyang Ahjussi (Old Man))
[Want some worms?]
Can she eat that much?
Refreshing
[Satisfied Tzu-jussi]
[Kalguksu (knife-cut noodles) with Tzu-jussi]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat Kalguksu today
This is a Kalguksu restaurant located in Heungin-dong near Hwanghak-dong
There's a unique dish here
Fish egg & intestine noodles
This place is very popular
Wait times can go up to an hour

People wait in line to get in
Thankfully, they let me come in to film during their break hours
I need to eat quickly and leave
Let's go
[Hani Kalguksu] [Seoul Teukbyeol-si, Jung-gu]
There are 3 types of kalguksu here
They're all pretty interesting
Fish Roe & Intestines, Hangover Cure, and Marsh Clams?
What are marsh clams?
They're small clams from Hadong
So it's just a clam kalguksu
I'm here during their break time
So only 5? Since I need to leave ASAP
2 orders of fish egg & intestines,
1 hangover cure,
2 freshwater marsh clams,

What's a popular side?
Our assorted plate
Then I'll take that one
[Order complete]
[Let's make some Kalguksu]
[Cool down the noodles to make it more gelatinous]
[Welcome, is it your first time seeing this dish?]
[Fish Roe & Intestines Kalguksu]
[A refreshing dish that will relax your body]
[Freshwater Marsh Clam Kalguksu]
[Pay attention to this one if you had a drink last night]
[Hangover Cure Kalguksu]
[The god of sides]
[Quality you can see...]
[Assorted plate]
[Kalguksu noodles & sides complete!]

That might be too much for herself
How can all of that fit?
[It's a simple meal today...]
-Looks different from regular clams -Right
You can dip the fish egg & intestines in here
Thank you
The visuals are crazy Take a look at this
It's really packed
The hangover cure one looks like a spicy fish soup
The broth seems very thick It's creating a outer layer around the bowl
That's a sign that the soup is deep and rich
What?
A barrier?
It's not soup yet
Let's start What to eat first?
Bon appetit

This is freshwater marsh clam
The size is pretty average
But looks different Let's try 1
Tasty
Some saltiness
The consistency is different from a regular clam
It's better
Some soup
Refreshing
This is no joke
The fish roe & intestine is their signature dish here
Let's try some soup first
This is going to be great
Wow, that's so good
This is not kalguksu
It's a very tasty fish roe soup

Better than other fish roe soup
I'm a fish roe killer
Dip it
Savory
Intestine too
Meaty and delicious
The noodles now
It goes so well together
Really unique and delicious
I can taste that it was cooked for a long time
It's tasty and there's so much roe in here It's a fish roe explosion, is it usually this much?
The prices are so nice
Regular Kalguksu dishes go for 8,000 Won everywhere (~$6.35 USD)
But this fish roe & intestine one only costs 11,000 Won (~$8.73 USD)
Isn't that really cheap?
And they give you this much

It's very tender and tasty
There's rice too after finishing the noodles
Rice is free here with free refills
Kalguksu noodles, fish roe & intestines, and rice for 11,000 Won
It's good
A lot of noodles too
The noodles aren't too chewy, they're very soft
Kimchi too
Kimchi tastes good too
Kimchi is important here too
And it's good
I heard that the sides are good too
This is not the pan-fried patty that I know
It's supposed to be a little dry
It disappeared in 3 seconds
Very juicy and tender

This is a must here It's so good
Within 3 chews
Wow, this is really good!
[Today is a kalguksu mukbang]
I'm really not chewing on anything
It melts away like an ice cream really
I was going to eat this last
The patties were just too good
Is the pork going to be good too?
That's what's up
It doesn't have a gamey taste
-There are white kimchi to go with the kalguksu -Thank you
They have white kimchi here
It's sweet
Perfect to cool down the spiciness
With some red kimchi

Kimchi on top
Amazing
I'll just eat now
Since the noodles can't get too soggy
What's even in here?
What's this?
Intestines?
Tripe It's like an intestine soup
[Get all the noodles out]
This is a lot of food
These taste completely different I thought they would taste similar because of the color
This really tastes like a hangover cure soup
Lovely
This calls for some alcohol
Good hangover cure and also a good alcohol food
Alcohol for a hangover

You see the meat and the intestines in here,
They're not chewy or tough to chew at all
These are so tender that I can tell it's been cooked for a while
The meat is as soft as the noodles
Never-ending fish roe & intestines
Do they usually give you this much?
It's just endless
[No words=Delicious]
The white kalguksu is good too
[Take out, eat, repeat]
When will I eat all of these clams?
Let's take the meat out
[Success...]
This bowl too... There's no end
[All that for 5 seconds of eating...]
[With some white kimchi to neutralize the spiciness]

It's definitely less spicy with the white kimchi
It's very unique Something I never had before
It's good
[Just surprised...]
Dip this here
[Same spot, different temperatures...]
The patties must have gotten cold
It's still good
With some pickled onions
It's before 5 right now
But there are customers waiting in line already
I feel bad for eating by myself
The owner asked me to come during their break hours so that the other customers are not too distracted from filming
But they're watching me eat from outside
I need to mix rice
[Goes away to get some rice...]

[Collecting all the fish roe and intestines in 1 bowl]
[And in goes the rice]
This really isn't 1 serving
[Enjoy rice after the noodles]
This feels like a fish porridge
That's so good
[Just funny...]
I'm a big eater too
But that's not it...
I didn't think she'd be able to finish it all That's incredible
Meat on top
That's so good
[Calm down...]
It's not easy to find pork slices that are good after they get cold
I would order the fish roe & intestines kalguksu again next time
And for the marsh clams,

I'm not ready to pick the clam meat out all over again
I can't
This should be good with rice too
I'll pass today due to limited time
The hangover cure one is really good too
It tastes better now The deep flavors are stronger
Like a very rich Yukgaejang soup (spicy beef soup)
[Tzu-Joker]
[Let's finish the rest]
I want to try eating 5 bowls too...
[Today's mukbang clear!]
These were very unique dishes that I've never had before
They were all very tasty
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
